Order of the Fallen Star

Chronicle Timeline  ·  Codex Record
"From betrayal, we were forged. From the void, we struck. From the Fallen Star, we ascended."
Filter:
Age I  ·  The Age of Severance
Founding Event
The Fracture — Birth of the Order
A fracture within The Galactic Order gives rise to a new force. The Order of the Fallen Star formally breaks away, refusing imposed hierarchy and demanding purpose over obedience. The separation is neither quiet nor forgiven.
War Event
The First War Begins
The Galactic Order views OFS's departure as open defiance. Conflict erupts immediately. Outnumbered and newly formed, the Order fights for identity and autonomy rather than territory. Supply lines are thin. Structure is still forming. Yet the Order endures through unity of purpose.
Founding Event
The First Losses
Members are lost not only to battle but to uncertainty — some in conflict with TGO, others departing under the weight of risk and doubt. These losses are not hidden. They become the first teacher, reinforcing that commitment is a choice, not an expectation.
War Event
Survival — The First Victory
The First War concludes without the destruction of the Fallen Star. The Order's mere survival is declared its first victory. The Galactic Order's assumption that OFS would collapse is proven catastrophically wrong.
Age II  ·  The Age of Embers
Founding Event
Consolidation — Houses and Paths Established
Veterans of the First War carry their lessons forward. Houses are established. Paths are defined. Authority becomes something earned through action rather than inherited through rank. The doctrine of the Order hardens from ember into iron.
War Event
First Decisive Victory Over TGO
The Order achieves its first decisive military victory against The Galactic Order. The Fallen Star is no longer a provisional breakaway — it is permanent. TGO remains watchful but diminished in its confidence.
Age III  ·  The Age of Fracture & Reflection
Political Event
Internal Fractures — The Great Debate
As strength grows, so does difference. Internal conflicts emerge over structure, authority, and purpose. Some seek constant war; others argue for inward consolidation. Some members depart. Yet the Order chooses reflection over rigidity — identity becomes intentional.
Age IV  ·  The Age of Betrayal Rekindled
Political Event
Peace Collapses — TGO Breaks Its Accord
Agreements with The Galactic Order fracture. TGO demonstrates clear intent to undermine and suppress the Order of the Fallen Star. War reignites — but this time OFS faces it as a disciplined, self-aware war structure. The Order dictates the tempo.
War Event
Shadowed Threats — Prelude to Open War
Tensions escalate as TGO sends shadowed threats to Primarchs and Knights of the Fallen Star. Provocations shift from political pressure to direct military action. The Order braces for open conflict.
War Event
Strike on Dupree Facility, Hurston
TGO operatives launch raids against the Dupree Facility on Hurston — OFS's forward bastion and proving ground. Elite pilots scramble under Emergency Code Aurora-Prime, intercepting and driving attackers back. Each repelled strike strengthens the Order's resolve and exposes TGO's growing desperation.
War Event
Captain Blacklung's Bold Assault on Dupree
TGO's Captain Blacklung leads a direct assault against Dupree. The Order counters in full measure under the personal command of Primarch Vanderan — the retaliatory strike cripples Blacklung's forces, dismantles their logistics, and scatters their command across the void.
War Event
The 1st Fleet Launches — The Hunt Begins
Intelligence gathered by Codex Scribes traces TGO's fractured fleet through jump points and encrypted transmissions. The Order unleashes the 1st Fleet of the Fallen Star — Knights, Crusaders, and pilots united under one banner — harrying TGO's retreat toward the Pyro System.
Chronicle I
War Event — Decisive Battle
Battle of Pyro's Heart
At 0300 hours Galactic Standard, fleets converge at the Pyro nexus. TGO's High Admiral Crazy commands a massive carrier group with absolute confidence. The Order strikes like a celestial storm — air wings, ground strike teams on the planetoid below, and orbital bombardments shatter TGO's formation. Blacklung's flagship burns within minutes. High Admiral Crazy is wounded and forced to retreat. The Pyro System falls under the mark of the Fallen Star.
Chronicle II
Exploration / Hunt
Hunt of the Twin Snakes — Descent into the ASD Facility
Reconnaissance uncovers anomalous energy readings beneath the derelict ASD Facility. A vast cavern system pulses with residual power. Designations confirmed: the Yormandi — twin serpentine horrors from the earliest terraform cycles. Knights descend under lumen-lit banners of the Fallen Star.
Exploration / Hunt
The Yormandi Slain — Trophies of Conquest
Led by Primarch Vanderan and U-Gen-X formations, the Knights engage both beasts. The first Yormandi falls to combined fire and an Iron Reavers charge; the second is beheaded by coordinated assault and burned. The twin skulls are decreed for mounting in the Hall of Triumph.
Chronicle III
Political Event
The War of the Shattered Oath — TGO Sues for Peace
The Galactic Order formally sues for peace. After deliberation, the Triumvirate accepts — declaring a resounding victory in the First War. The peace accord is honored from a position of strength. As recorded: "We chose peace because we have already won."
Age V  ·  The Age of Reckoning
Chronicle V
War Event
The Chronicle of the Broken Mask — War Reignites
A TGO agent impersonates Knight Ciberking — a sworn brother of the Order — as a tool of manipulation and mockery. The Primarch issues no warning. The response is delivered in fire above MicroTech: Blacklung's vessel, bearing a full TGO squad, is interdicted and destroyed. No survivors. The blade is drawn again.
War Event — Decisive
The Age of Reckoning — The Final Coordinated Strike
After months of preparation and intelligence gathering, the Order launches a massive, coordinated strike against The Galactic Order. Operations are unified. Command acts with absolute clarity. TGO's remaining operational capacity is shattered. Their command structures fail. Internal cohesion dissolves.
Political Event
The Galactic Order Collapses
The Galactic Order enters disbandment and dissolution as a direct consequence of defeat. Leadership fractures. The force that once sought to control and suppress the Fallen Star ceases to exist as a coherent entity. The Order of the Fallen Star remains.
Age VI  ·  The Age of Ascendance
Chronicle IV
Exploration / Crusade
Crusade of Return — Muster at New Babbage
The Triumvirate — Vanderan, Kraz, and U-Gen-X — issues the unified decree: the Order returns home to the Nyx Star System. The Order rallies in full at New Babbage Spaceport. Chapter Master Cerulean Nightshade — The Iron Duke is appointed commander. Perseus-class warships ignite beneath the snow-veiled runways.
War Event
Nyx Arrival — Vanduul Engagement
The fleet surges through the Nyx Jumpgate. Within minutes of arrival, a rogue Vanduul squadron hidden in Nyx's torn shadows barrels toward the fleet. The Perseus line advances in coordinated volleys. Through synchronized fire and indomitable will, the Vanduul are shattered and driven into the void. Nyx acknowledges the Order's strength.
Exploration / Combat
The Station in the Dark — Delamar Purged
Scouts locate an abandoned station drifting near Delamar. Inside: a black-market faction dealing in forbidden Vanduul xeno-tech. Knights and Templars engage in close-quarters combat through the corridors. The syndicate is eliminated. The station is purged.
Founding Event
Levski Established — First Bastion in Nyx
With orbit secured, the Triumvirate orders a forward base established at Levski, the ancient mining settlement carved into the asteroid Delamar. The banners of the Fallen Star are raised in the system of the Order's birthright. Levski becomes the first OFS bastion in the Nyx System. The Fallen Star burns bright again over Nyx.
War & Battle
Political
Exploration / Hunt
Founding
Decisive Moment
Glory to the Fallen Star. Our light endures, unbroken.
